title: National Scholarships — December 2020 catalog
html:
TL;DR

  • Dec 4, 2020 working list of 13 national scholarships Yahir tracked during senior-year college admissions season — pre-OSU commitment.
  • Catalog spans CS-track (Amazon Future Engineer $10K, Google up to $10K, Davidson Fellow up to $50K), Hispanic-eligible (McDonald's HACER $100K over 4 yrs), and broad-merit (GE-Reagan $10K renewable, Burger King McLamore up to $50K, Engebretson $5K/sem, Ron Brown $40K).
  • Niche entries: Foot Locker Scholar Athletes ($20K), CFDA × Gucci Changemakers ($20K, women of color), Gallery Collection greeting-card design ($10K), 1-for-2 Education Foundation ($25K), Seattle Marketing hardship essay ($5K), State Farm legacy.
  • A pure reference doc — no Yahir voice, just dollar amounts + deadlines + descriptions. Companion to the Core Questions essay prompt master list from 19 days later.

Notes

This sits in the same senior-year Grants Pass research bin as the scholarship essays todo and scholarship essays. Per ingest skip rule, I'm not summarizing the actual essay drafts — but a pure-catalog research doc is a different artifact: it's evidence of the breadth of search, not the essay content itself. Yahir cast a wide net before Ford / Renaissance became the funded outcomes. Notable that none of the Hispanic-targeted national programs (Ron Brown, McDonald's HACER) appear in his actual award stack — he funded undergrad through Oregon-state-flavored scholarships (Ford, JCEF, Al Forthan, Renaissance) and not the national-merit pipeline.
